title: Quiz: Distributed VQE
description: Test your understanding of distributed Variational Quantum Eigensolver

questions.question: Why is VQE naturally suited for distribution?

options.text: It requires only one quantum device
Each Hamiltonian term can be measured independently

questions.explanation: The energy expectation value is a sum of terms, each of which can be measured independently on different devices.

questions.question: What is the advantage of partitioning by commutation groups?

options.text: Commuting terms can be measured with the same circuit

questions.explanation: Commuting Pauli operators can be measured simultaneously using a single circuit, reducing the total number of circuits needed.

questions.question: In inverse variance weighting, which results get higher weight?
questions.explanation: Inverse variance weighting gives more weight to results with lower variance, as they are more reliable.

questions.question: In synchronous distributed VQE, the optimization waits for all devices before updating parameters.
questions.explanation: True. Synchronous updates wait for all device results before computing the gradient and updating parameters.

questions.question: What is a challenge of weight-balanced partitioning?

options.text: It may separate commuting terms that could share circuits

questions.explanation: Balancing by coefficient weight may split commuting groups, losing the efficiency of simultaneous measurement.

questions.question: Why might asynchronous updates be preferred?

options.text: They avoid waiting for slow devices

questions.explanation: Async updates allow faster devices to continue without waiting for slow ones, improving overall throughput.

questions.question: What is a key consideration when selecting devices for distributed VQE?

options.text: Only the color of the device matters
Device fidelity and connectivity for the required gates
The device must be in the same room

questions.explanation: Device fidelity affects result quality, and connectivity determines whether required entangling gates can be implemented efficiently.

questions.question: Which are valid strategies for handling device heterogeneity in distributed VQE? (Select all)

options.text: Weight results by estimated device fidelity
Assign more critical terms to higher-fidelity devices
Monitor for calibration drift during optimization

questions.explanation: Weighting by fidelity, strategic term assignment, and drift monitoring all help handle heterogeneous devices effectively.
